data.title: Chainlink Creator Sergey Nazarov Says Crypto Is How the US Will Maintain Its Role in Global Financial System
data.description:
Chainlink (LINK) creator Sergey Nazarov says that the Trump Administration’s recent embrace of digital assets could be what the US needs to cement its global financial dominance. Speaking at the first ever White House Crypto Summit in Washington, D.C. with other industry leaders, Nazarov says he’s grateful for President Trump’s circle of experts finally taking […]

data.title: Binance: Will P2P Closure Impact Its Stablecoin Supply
data.description:
Binance recently said it will stop using its P2P Cash Zone service, which allows people to transact in cryptocurrency in person via registered merchants. The company is scheduled to shut down operations on March 31. The P2P Cash Zone was introduced in 2023 for use in regions with thinning banking services and transactions in more […]
The post Binance: Will P2P Closure Impact Its Stablecoin...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/09/binance-will-p2p-closure-impact-its-stablecoin-supply/

data.title: Solana Network Users Advised On Preventing Data Leaks
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent reports from crypto analyst @PepeBoost888 indicate that some Jito validators have been leaking data to sandwich attackers, allowing them to anticipate anti-sandwich transactions. To mitigate this issue, users of the Solana network are advised to take certain precautions.

Firstly, it is recommended to reduce slippage settings when operating in anti-sandwich mode. Additionally, Jito has already initiated a technical solution to address the misconduct of validator nodes, with ongoing progress expected in the coming weeks.

Despite these challenges, Jito remains the most reliable anti-sandwich service, with a very low percentage of anti-sandwich transactions being compromised.
